selections.instruction: Create a Blueprint with a Gate node. On BeginPlay, open the gate. On Tick, pass through the gate and print Ticking. On pressing the Close input action, close the gate.
Create a Blueprint with a boolean variable IsActive. On BeginPlay, use a Branch node to check IsActive. If true, print Active. If false, print Inactive.
Create a Blueprint that on BeginPlay uses a Sequence node to first print Step 1, then print Step 2, then print Step 3.
Create a Blueprint that prints Entered when another actor overlaps it and prints Exited when the overlap ends.
Create a Blueprint that toggles an actor's visibility each time the player presses the Interact input action using a FlipFlop node.
Create a Blueprint with a custom event called OnActivate. On BeginPlay, call the custom event. The custom event prints Activated when called.
Create a Blueprint with an actor variable Target. On BeginPlay, check if Target is valid. If valid, print Target Found. If not, print No Target.
Create a Blueprint that on overlap casts to Character. If cast succeeds, print Player. If cast fails, print Not A Player.
Create a Blueprint that on BeginPlay creates WBP_HealthBar and adds to viewport. On AnyDamage subtract damage from Health variable. If Health less than 0 remove widget and destroy actor.
Create a Blueprint with a string array Inventory. On BeginPlay add Sword to the array and print the array length.
Create a Blueprint with string array Names. On BeginPlay use ForEachLoop to print every name in the array.
Create a Blueprint that on BeginPlay creates a widget of class WBP_HUD and adds it to the viewport.
Create a Blueprint with string array Tags. On BeginPlay check if Tags contains Player. If yes print Is Player. If no print Not Player.
Create a Blueprint with a widget variable MenuWidget and bool MenuOpen. On pressing Menu, toggle: if open remove widget and set false, if closed create widget and set true.
Create a Blueprint with float variables X, Y, Z. On BeginPlay use a Sequence with 4 outputs. A prints X, B prints Y, C prints Z, D prints the sum of all three.

Create a Blueprint with an actor array Pickups and integer Score set to 0. On BeginPlay, loop through each pickup, add 10 to Score for each one, destroy the pickup, then after the loop print the total Score.
Create a Blueprint that on overlap casts to Character. If the cast succeeds, subtract 10 from a Health variable and print the remaining health.
Create a Blueprint that on pressing Next uses MultiGate with 3 outputs cycling. Output 0 prints Red. Output 1 prints Green. Output 2 prints Blue.
Create a Blueprint that on BeginPlay calls DestroyActor on self, which should be the entire graph. Just two nodes and one exec connection.
Create a Blueprint that on BeginPlay adds an upward impulse of 1000 units to launch the actor into the air.
Create a Blueprint that on BeginPlay uses a ForLoop 0 to 4 to spawn 5 actors in a row, each 200 units apart on the X axis.
Create a Blueprint that on overlap gets the display name of the overlapping actor and prints Overlapped by: followed by the name.
Create a Blueprint that on BeginPlay gets player pawn, validates it, casts to Character, and if all checks pass stores it in a variable Player and prints Connected.
Create a Blueprint with integer Count at 0. On BeginPlay use a WhileLoop while Count less than 5 to increment and print Count.
Create a Blueprint with integer Level. On BeginPlay use Switch on Int. Case 1 prints Easy. Case 2 prints Medium. Case 3 prints Hard. Default prints Unknown.
